c.d: The speed at which the app can transfer files between devices.
c.s: App reviews, developer specifications, user testing

c.d: The variety and number of file types the app supports for transfer.
The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
The app's ability to function across different operating systems and devices.
The measures taken by the app to ensure the security and privacy of file transfers.
c.s: App features list, security audits, user reviews

c.d: The average rating given by users on various app stores.
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, other app marketplaces

c.d: Any extra features the app offers beyond basic file transfer, such as cloud storage integration, chat, etc.
